issues.description: Action type 'SearchDeck' is incorrect. Card effect adds cards from trash to hand, not from deck. Should be 'PlayFromHand' or a trash-retrieval action. However, the DSL lacks proper trash-to-hand support; 'ReturnToHand' with trash source would be more appropriate.
Condition is 'Always' but effect text states 'If your Leader has the {FILM} type'. Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' with type value 'FILM'.
Filter is 'Any' but effect requires: source=trash, type={FILM}, kind=Character, cost≤4. Filter must specify these constraints.
Missing 'count' or 'maxCount' parameter. Effect states 'add up to 2' cards, implying a maximum of 2.
Effect description mentions 'DON!! −1' cost mechanic but DSL contains no action reflecting this DON!! return requirement. This is a precondition, not modeled in current DSL structure.
